description: Booster Lander LZ-COCKPIT shell: supervise the core sidecar (control-plane invokes only). Nothing else.
//: canon §10.6/§11.1: the shell spawns booster-core directly via tokio (not the
//2: shell plugin), so no shell:allow-execute is needed. The core exe is resolved by
//3: env override -> next-to-exe -> build dir (supervisor::core_path). Control-plane
//4: commands (relaunch/relight/status/port/stderr) validate their own args server-side.
